title: DHFWS Bankura Jobs 2026 - Apply Online for 16 Medical Officer, Attendant Posts
description: The District Health and Family Welfare Society Bankura (DHFWS Bankura) has officially released the notification to fill the vacancies of 16 Counsellors, NRC Attendant, Staff Nurse, Pharmacists, Psychologist, Medical Officers, and District Consultant Jobs. Interested and eligibile candidates can use this opportunity to apply for these posts before the last date of application. Candidates who have completed their MBBS, D. Pharm, GNM, B.Sc Nursing, Any Degree, 10th can apply for the DHFWS Bankur...
